seoTitle: How to Connect Dataverse to Power BI
metaDescription: Connect Dataverse to Power BI to visualize Power Platform data, with setup steps and tips for keeping your reports current.
intro: If your organization uses Dataverse as part of the Power Platform, connecting it to Power BI lets you turn that data into visual, shareable reports. This guide covers the connection setup and how to start visualizing your Dataverse data effectively. It's useful for sales teams, operations managers, and anyone relying on Power Platform data for decisions.

steps.heading: Set up Dataverse for the connection
steps.body: Make sure your Dataverse environment and tables are ready and accessible before starting the connection process in Power BI.

steps.heading: Connect to Power BI
steps.body: Use Power BI's Dataverse connector to link your environment, entering the necessary connection details to establish access.

steps.heading: Visualize your data
steps.body: Bring the connected Dataverse tables into your report and start building visuals based on the fields you need.

steps.heading: Apply automation tips
steps.body: Set up scheduled refreshes so your Power BI report stays aligned with the latest Dataverse records without manual updates.

steps.heading: Use it for business reporting
steps.body: Apply the connection to real scenarios, such as visualizing customer data trends or operational performance metrics from the Power Platform.

faq.question: Do I need special permissions to connect Dataverse to Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need appropriate access to the Dataverse environment and its tables before Power BI can connect successfully.

faq.question: Can I automate data refreshes from Dataverse?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, you can schedule refreshes so your Power BI report reflects the most current Dataverse records.

faq.question: Is this connection useful for sales teams?
faq.answer: Yes, sales teams commonly use this setup to visualize customer data trends stored in Dataverse.

faq.question: Does connecting Dataverse to Power BI require coding?
faq.answer: No, the connection is set up through Power BI's built-in connector without needing custom code.

faq.question: Can I combine Dataverse data with other data sources in the same report?
faq.answer: Yes, Power BI supports combining Dataverse data with other connected sources within the same data model.
